parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, channel: 'notice', whatsappMessage: item.whatsappMessage } }];

const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, channel: 'visitor', whatsappMessage: item.whatsappMessage } }];

const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, channel: 'fallback', whatsappMessage: item.whatsappMessage ?? item.summary ?? 'Syncra Society update' } }];

parameters.content:
## Outbound router

`Route by Event Type` outputs:
1. notice — announcements
2. visitor — gatekeeper approvals
3. payment — billing reminders & receipts
4. fallback — catch-all

NEVER use `=={{ ... }}` in Twilio fields.
